mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
AND role_name LIKE '%' || #{roleName} || '%'
AND role_code LIKE '%' || #{roleCode} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_code, description, status) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, role_code = #{roleCode}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
